name: 3 Closes Broadcast Mini-Campaign — Emotion / Logic / Fear Ascension Push

sections: Funnel Hacker's Cookbook #24 — Follow-Up Funnel ('moves leads through the 3 Closes framework: Emotion close -> Logic close -> Fear close')
DotCom Secrets — Star/Story/Solution closes: Emotional/If-All close (#27), Guarantee/Logic (#29), Scarcity/Fear close (#30), Takeaway selling (#34)
Copywriting Secrets — Ten Reasons People Buy, honest-scarcity integrity rule, takeaway/FOMO close

trigger.primary: A scheduled PROMO WINDOW to the engaged broadcast segment — new offer, open cart, event-registration push, or value-ladder ascension. Layered ON TOP of the daily Seinfeld cadence for ~5-7 days.
trigger.trigger_type_ghl: Tag Added 'promo-{offer}' to the seinfeld-broadcast segment, OR a scheduled campaign start date.

sequence.purpose: Create desire; people buy on emotion.
sequence.bodyFramework: Seinfeld story -> emotional offer. Future pacing + the If-All anchor: 'If all this did was ___, would it be worth it?' Use BOTH toward-pleasure and away-from-pain statements.
Value stack; float a fake price then reveal the real price ('dollars for dimes'); crazy-named guarantee that reverses risk; social proof / case studies; ease + speed + 'so' benefits.

sequence.purpose: Trigger action now via legitimate urgency.
sequence.bodyFramework: Real scarcity (cart closes / seats left / price goes up / offer pulled) + Takeaway selling ('it doesn't matter to us if you join or not...'). Honor the deadline — fake urgency backfires.
sequence.branch: If/Else: purchased? -> exit (add buyer tag) | not purchased -> send.

sequence.subjectAngle: 'You missed it / next chance' or down-sell.
sequence.bodyFramework: Brief cart-closed note + a down-sell or wait-list CTA.

copyPersona.primary: Brunson Star/Story/Solution closes mapped to the 3 Closes: Emotional/If-All (#27), Guarantee/Logic (#29), Scarcity+Takeaway (#30/#34).
copyPersona.secondary: Edwards — Ten Reasons People Buy, dollars-for-dimes value framing, and the non-negotiable honest-scarcity rule.

ghlBuild.buildType: A REAL GoHighLevel WORKFLOW (autoresponder-style mini-drip) — distinct from the daily broadcast; this one IS sequenced.
ghlBuild.trigger: Tag Added 'promo-{offer}' on the seinfeld-broadcast Smart List (or scheduled campaign).
actions: If/Else: purchased? (check order tag / opportunity stage)  -> YES: Remove from campaign + Add Tag buyer  / NO: continue
If/Else: purchased?  -> YES: exit  / NO: continue
Send Email (Fear close)  +  Send SMS reminder
ghlBuild.goalEvent: Configure a Goal / If-Else on 'Purchase made' (opportunity stage or product/order tag) so buyers exit immediately and stop receiving promo emails.
ghlBuild.notes: Set action order + parentKey before the first save (Skill 44 reliability). Use Wait-until-date for the real deadline. Suppress these contacts from competing promos while in-campaign.

kpis: open/click by close type (which close converts your list)
faithfulness: The 3 Closes framework (Emotion -> Logic -> Fear) is stated in Funnel Hacker's Cookbook #24 (Follow-Up Funnel). The specific close mechanics (If-All emotional anchor, fake/real price, crazy-named guarantee, scarcity, takeaway selling) are the Star/Story/Solution closes from DotCom Secrets. Honest-scarcity is an Edwards non-negotiable. The 3-email cadence and GHL workflow are the Skill-44 operationalization; exact day-gaps are a sensible default, not a fixed book number.
